description_long: This airplane features a sleek, angular design with a sharply pointed nose and a predominantly black fuselage accented by blue and yellow wing panels. The wings are swept back and positioned low on the body, with a distinctive lightning bolt pattern in yellow on each side. The cockpit is integrated smoothly into the forward section of the fuselage, with a dark, streamlined canopy that appears to be single-seat and enclosed. The tail section is elevated and tapers to a narrow point, with a single vertical stabilizer and no visible horizontal stabilizers. The engine intake is centrally located at the rear, suggesting a jet propulsion system, and there are no visible landing gear components. The overall appearance is futuristic and aerodynamic, suitable for high-speed urban or sci-fi environments.
description: A sleek, futuristic black airplane with swept low wings, lightning bolt accents, and a pointed nose, featuring a single vertical tail and a streamlined, enclosed cockpit.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pointed nose, angular canopy, and swept low wings with yellow lightning bolt accents.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the elongated fuselage, low-mounted swept wing, and the single vertical stabilizer at the rear.
description_view_2: Top-down view emphasizes the narrow, streamlined body, wing shape, and the central engine intake at the rear.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the same wing and tail configuration with visible lightning bolt pattern.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, swept configuration with angular, delta-like panels and no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single rear-mounted jet engine with central intake.
attribute_tail_design: Single vertical stabilizer with no visible horizontal stabilizers, resembling a minimalist or unconventional tail design.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, single-seat, enclosed cockpit with a streamlined dark canopy.
